Cleanvoice

AI removes filler words, mouth sounds, and dead air

7/10Overall Rating
9/10Ease of Use
$10/moStarting Price
2021Founded
Free Plan Available

About Cleanvoice

Cleanvoice is a ai audio & music platform founded in 2021. It positions itself as “AI removes filler words, mouth sounds, and dead air” and is best suited for podcast post production, cleaning up recorded audio. Pricing starts at $10/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To SpeechNo
Voice CloningNo
Speech To TextNo
Noise RemovalYes
Music GenerationNo
Podcast EditingYes
MultilingualYes
Api AccessYes
Custom VoicesNo
Real TimeNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Excellent filler word removal
  • Handles multiple languages
  • Simple upload-and-clean workflow
  • API available

Cons

  • Very niche tool
  • No recording or TTS
  • Processing can be slow
